routines.title: Surya Namaskar (Sun Salutations)
routines.description: A traditional sequence of 12 powerful yoga postures designed to awaken vital energy, improve circulation, and build physical flexibility. Excellent for morning practice.

routines.title: Spinal Alignment & Awakening
routines.description: Focuses on gentle spinal twists, cat-cow stretches, and chest openers to release stiffness from desk work, correct posture, and ground the nervous system.

routines.title: Gentle Joint Mobilization
routines.description: A slow, therapeutic practice targeting joint mobility and energy flow. Focuses on neck rolls, shoulder openers, wrist flexions, and ankle rotations to improve fluid circulation.

routines.title: Vinyasa Flow: Solar Awakening
routines.description: An energizing, dynamic flow connecting breath and movement to build core stability, leg strength, and internal heat. Recommended for intermediate practitioners.

routines.title: Deep Hip & Glute Release
routines.description: A focused, deep stretching sequence targeting the gluteus muscles, piriformis, and deep hip rotators to release accumulated lower body tension.

routines.title: Shoulder Openers & Neck Release
routines.description: Gentle but deep somatic releases for tight shoulders, upper back, and neck, counteracting the effects of prolonged screen time.

routines.title: Hamstring Sanctuary Flow
routines.description: A slow-paced stretching routine aiming to safely lengthen the hamstrings and release tension in the posterior chain.

routines.title: Ashtanga Vinyasa Flow (Advanced)
routines.description: A highly challenging, continuous physical sequence synchronizing breath and movement. For advanced practitioners with significant arm balance and core strength.

routines.title: Nadi Shodhana (Alternate Nostril)
routines.description: A classical pranayama technique to balance the left and right hemispheres of the brain, quiet the mind, reduce anxiety, and purify subtle energy channels.

routines.title: Kapalabhati (Skull Shining Breath)
routines.description: A powerful, invigorating breathing technique utilizing active, rapid exhalations to clear the nasal passages, increase oxygenation, and energize the brain.

routines.title: Sheetali (Cooling Breath)
routines.description: A soothing, cooling pranayama technique helpful for reducing physical body temperature, calming anger, and relieving stress.

routines.title: Box Breathing (Sama Vritti)
routines.description: A highly structured equal ratio breathing technique (4s inhale, 4s hold, 4s exhale, 4s hold) used by high performers to regulate the nervous system and build extreme focus.

routines.title: Bhramari (Humming Bee Breath)
routines.description: An deep humming vibration practice to trigger the parasympathetic nervous system, release mental tension, and quiet racing thoughts. Ideal for preparing for sleep.

routines.title: Trataka (Focused Gazing)
routines.description: A traditional concentration practice involving steady gazing at a specific point or candle flame to improve mental focus, quiet active thoughts, and stimulate inner vision.

routines.title: Yoga Nidra (Psychic Sleep)
routines.description: A guided, deep relaxation practice that induces a state between waking and sleeping. Excellent for releasing physical, mental, and emotional tensions.

routines.title: Chakra Beeja Mantra Chanting
routines.description: A meditative chanting session using primordial seed sounds (Lam, Vam, Ram, Yam, Ham, Om) of the energy centers to align body vibration and induce deep silence.

routines.title: Anapana (Breath Mindfulness)
routines.description: Focusing the mind entirely on the natural, unforced breath at the entrance of the nostrils to build stillness, sensory awareness, and mental clarity.

routines.title: Metta (Loving-Kindness)
routines.description: A meditation practice expanding unconditional compassion and wishing safety, happiness, and peace to oneself, loved ones, and eventually all living beings.
